zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Dillon於1426年4月15日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯馬瑟托時，他的父親Richard Dillon26歲，母親Jeane Wile23歲。他於1477年與Elizabeth Bathe在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯紐托 特利姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Dillon于1426年4月15日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯馬瑟托时，他的父亲Richard Dillon26岁，母亲Jeane Wile23岁。他于1477年与Elizabeth Bathe在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯紐托 特利姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1508年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Dillon was born on 15 April 1426, in Macetown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Richard Dillon, was 26 and his mother, Jeane Wile, was 23. He married Elizabeth Bathe in 1477, in Newtown Trim, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1508, in County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Dillon est né le 15 avril 1426, à Macetown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Richard Dillon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeane Wile, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bathe en 1477, à Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1508, à County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Dillon am 15. April 1426 in Macetown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Dillon 26 und seine Mutter Jeane Wile 23. Er hat 1477 in Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irland Elizabeth Bathe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1508 im Alter von 82 Jahren in County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Dillon è nato il il 15 aprile 1426 nel Macetown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Richard Dillon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jeane Wile, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bathe nel 1477, nel Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1508, nel County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Dillonが1426年4月15日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスマセトウンで生まれた時，父Richard Dillonは26歳，母Jeane Wileは23歳であった。1477年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスニュートウン トリムでElizabeth Batheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1508年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Dillon(이)가 1426년 4월 15일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 메이스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Dillon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeane Wile(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1477년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 뉴타운 트림에서 Elizabeth Bathe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Dillon nasceu em 15 de abril de 1426, em Macetown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Richard Dillon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeane Wile, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bathe em 1477, em Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1508, em County Meath, Irlanda, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Dillon родился 15 апреля 1426 г. в местности меисетоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Richard Dillon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeane Wile, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bathe в 1477 г. в местности нютоун трим, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1508 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Dillon nació el 15 de abril de 1426, en Macetown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Richard Dillon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jeane Wile, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bathe en 1477, en Newtown Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1508, en County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 82 años.
